name: bebi-website
description: Private MERN relationship memory archive for songs, messages, gallery photos, memories, and milestones.

scripts.lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix client run typecheck && npm --prefix server run typecheck
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server

name: bebi-website
description: Private MERN relationship memory archive for songs, messages, photos, and milestones.

scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace client && npm run lint --workspace server
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace server && npm run build --workspace client
